items.title: Creating a mirage called employee: Another way a management can manipulate profits and mislead investors
items.summary: It was one of India's best-known IT companies, yet it manipulated its accounts for years. The issue came to light only when the gap in the books had become too large to hide, and company officials themselves admitted that the reported number of its employees was not real. What made this particular episode especially disturbing was that the distortion allegedly ran as deep as the employee base. Tens of thousands of employees were said to exist

items.title: India rejects 'NYT' report that Musk joined key Modi-Trump call
items.summary:
New Delhi: The latest telephone conversation, on March 24, was between US President Donald Trump and Prime Minister Narendra Modi, the Centre clarified on Saturday, denying reports that billionaire Elon Musk was also part of the call between the two leaders.

Trump had called PM Modi to discuss the war with Iran on Tuesday, the first interaction between the two leaders since Israel and the US' military strikes on Iran began on February 28. "We have seen the story. The telephone conversation on 24 March was between Prime Minister Narendra Modi and President Donald Trump only," a spokesperson of the Ministry of External Affairs underlined.

"As has been stated earlier, it provided the opportunity for exchange of views on the situation in West Asia," the spokesperson added. The New York Times, in its edition on Saturday, quoting unnamed US officials, said billionaire Musk participated in the phone call between the two leaders.Cont'd on Page 4

"Elon Musk participated in a phone call on Tuesday with President Trump and Prime Minister Narendra Modi of India, an unusual appearance by a private citizen on a call between two heads of state during a wartime crisis," the New York Times reported.

Trump and Musk had a falling out last year following the billionaire's departure from the government, where he had been tasked with slashing the work force. The report said it is unclear why Musk was on the call or whether he spoke.

In a post on X, PM Modi detailed the diplomatic exchange, stating that both sides called for an "open, secure and accessible" Strait of Hormuz and reiterated India's stance on de-escalation and peace in the region. "Received a call from President Trump and had a useful exchange of views on the situation in West Asia. India supports de-escalation and restoration of peace at the earliest. Ensuring that the Strait of Hormuz remains open, secure and accessible is essential for the whole world. We agreed to stay in touch regarding efforts towards peace and stability," the PM stated in his post.

items.title: 2 India-bound LPG tankers cross Hormuz
items.summary:
New Delhi: Two liquefied petroleum gas tankers, BW Elm and BW Tyr, are crossing the Strait of Hormuz bound for India, according to ship tracking data from LSEG and Kpler.

The US-Israeli war against Iran has all but halted shipping through the strait, but Iran said this week that "non-hostile vessels" may transit the waterway if they coordinate with Iranian authorities.

India is gradually moving its stranded LPG cargoes out from the strait, with four LPG tankers moved so far - Shivalik, Nanda Devi, Pine Gas, and Jag Vasant.

As of Friday, 20 Indian-flagged ships including five LPG carriers were stranded in the Gulf, Rajesh Kumar Sinha, special secretary ⁠in the federal shipping ministry, said.

LPG carriers Jag Vikram, Green Asha and Green Sanvi are still in the western Strait of Hormuz, LSEG data show.

India, the world's second-largest LPG importer, is battling its worst ⁠gas crisis in decades, with the government cutting supplies for industries to shield households from any shortage of cooking gas.

items.title: M'sia should aim for 50% renewable energy by 2030, says Santiago
items.summary:
PETALING JAYA: Malaysia must accelerate its transition towards solar energy and reduce reliance on fossil fuels, says Asean Parlia­mentarians for Human Rights chairman Charles Santiago.

This is especially so in view of the global energy uncertainty driven by geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, he said.

He pointed out the sharp glo­bal pivot towards renewable energy.

Investments in solar and ­battery storage have surged ­dramatically in recent weeks, he added.

"In just 24 days, about US$70bil (RM274.68bil) has been invested globally into solar panels, battery storage and related technologies.

"This reflects a sudden and urgent recognition of the need to move away from fossil fuels," he said at a media conference on Friday on the impact of the US-Iran conflict on climate change, held in conjunction with the Asean and South Asia preparatory meeting for COP31.

Santiago, who is former Malay­sian Water Services Commission (SPAN) chairman, cautioned that while oil supply may stabilise in the short term, gas shortages could persist for several years due to disruptions in key production centres, particularly in the United Arab Emirates.

He acknowledged Malaysia's progress under its National Energy Transition Roadmap, adding that renewable energy made up 31% of the national energy mix in 2025, up from 23% in 2020.

However, he said the current target of 35% by 2030 was insufficient.

"Malaysia should be bold and aim for at least 50% renewable energy by 2030," he said.

Strategic adviser and Asia lead of India's Fossil Fuel Treaty Initiative Harjeet Singh said structural inequalities driven by wealthy nations have contributed to both the climate crisis and geopolitical instability.

"This crisis, whether we look at debt or inequality, is caused by systems created and promoted by the Global North. We are all victims," he said.

He said military emissions, which account for more than 5% of global greenhouse gas emissions, are not adequately ­captured under the Paris Agreement and are likely increasing amid ongoing conflicts.

Coordinator of the Asian People's Movement on Debt and Development Lidy Nacpil said scaling up renewable energy is faster, cheaper and more strategic than expanding fossil fuels.

"Building a coal plant takes four to five years, while solar or wind can be completed within one to two years.

"It's quicker, more practical and cheaper in the long run," she said.

ai_analysis.full_text:
【今日結論】
國際市場在上週五迎來劇烈震盪，美股四大指數全面重挫，VIX 恐慌指數飆升至 30 以上的警戒區，顯示市場避險情緒急速升溫。然而，在科技股普遍承壓的環境下，台積電 ADR 逆勢收紅，展現出顯著的個股韌性。此現象預示著下週台股開盤將面臨「國際恐慌情緒」與「本土多方信心」的直接對決。儘管台股長期趨勢仍為多頭，但短期波動風險已大幅增加，市場焦點將集中在大型權值股是否能扮演穩盤角色，以及本土資金的承接力道。
【新聞驅動】
根據新聞來源分佈，市場資訊呈現內外分歧。國際方面，美股與全球宏觀頭條主要圍繞著市場的負面情緒，可能與通膨擔憂再起、地緣政治風險或對未來經濟放緩的預期有關，這些因素共同觸發了美股的獲利了結賣壓。另一方面，台灣本土新聞熱點（MoneyDJ、鉅亨網）在上週仍聚焦於特定產業的正面展望，例如 AI 供應鏈、高股息題材及個別公司的法說會利多，顯示內資關注焦點仍在企業基本面與成長動能，與國際宏觀的悲觀氣氛形成對比。
【國際與台股】
數據清晰地描繪了市場的風險趨避：
*   國際市場恐慌： S&P 500 (-1.67%)、Nasdaq (-2.15%)、費半 (-1.69%) 全數下跌，Nasdaq 期貨在盤後續挫，顯示空方力道強勁。VIX 指數大漲 13.16% 至 31.05，CNN 恐懼與貪婪指數降至 10 (極度恐懼)，確認市場處於避險模式。
*   台股指標分歧： 台股加權指數上週五已先行收黑 (-225 點)，且下跌家數 (515) 多於上漲家數 (419)，顯示盤面結構已顯露疲態。然而，台灣市場的貪婪指數仍高達 61 (貪婪)，與美國的極度恐懼形成強烈反差。
*   關鍵的 ADR 訊號： 最值得關注的訊號是，在費半指數重挫超過 1.6% 的情況下，台積電 ADR 竟能逆勢上漲 0.19%。這表明全球資金在拋售科技股的同時，可能將資金轉進如台積電這類具有領先地位和基本面支撐的「優質資產」。相較之下，台灣 ETF (EWT) 下跌 0.87%，跌幅小於美股大盤，也顯示台股整體具備相對抗跌性。
【KOL與情緒】
市場情緒呈現顯著的內外溫差。國際投資社群，受 VIX 飆漲與指數重挫影響，普遍瀰漫著悲觀與防禦心態。然而，台灣本土的投資情緒在上週五收盤時仍偏向樂觀，KOL 與社群討論可能還停留在追逐強勢股與高殖利率題材的氛圍中。可以預期，這個週末的網路輿論風向將出現轉變，從原先的追高討論，轉為激辯台股能否在全球跌勢中獨善其身，或是否應減碼避險。
【操作含意】
在高波動環境下，操作應更為謹慎：
1.  預期開盤壓力： 考量美股重挫，下週一台股開盤預期將承受顯著賣壓，指數可能跳空開低以反應國際利空。
2.  觀察防守力道： 開盤後的觀察重點在於指數下探至關鍵支撐區時，買盤承接的力道，特別是大型權值股如台積電的股價表現。台積電 ADR 的強勢，為台股提供了一絲「以個股強韌對抗系統性風險」的可能性。
3.  汰弱留強時機： 目前的市場環境 (`regime=BULL_HIGH`, `vol=HIGH`) 意味著多頭趨勢仍在，但波動劇烈。這是一個檢視持股的時機，資金可能從漲多但基本面跟不上的個股，流向體質穩健的龍頭股。應避免在此時投入高風險槓桿或追高弱勢反彈股。
4.  保持策略彈性： 在 VIX 回落至 25 以下，且美股期貨止穩前，保守應對為宜。可考慮部分獲利了結，保留現金以待市場方向更為明朗時再行佈局。

selected_charts.title: 美股與風險資產
selected_charts.description: S&P 500、Nasdaq、SOX、VIX 與美元、黃金、原油的跨資產訊號。
selected_charts.takeaway: 美股上週五收盤遭遇全面重挫，S&P 500 與 Nasdaq 跌幅均超過 1.5%，VIX 恐慌指數飆升 13.16% 至 31 的警戒高位，顯示市場避險情緒急劇升溫。
selected_charts.action: 觀察國際市場的恐慌情緒是否會在本週延續，並影響全球資產配置。

selected_charts.title: 盤前指標
selected_charts.description: Nasdaq 期貨、台積電 ADR、台灣 ETF 與台股盤前連動。
selected_charts.takeaway: 儘管 Nasdaq 期貨重挫超過 2.2%，但台積電 ADR 在科技股普遍承壓的環境下逆勢收紅，顯示出獨特的個股韌性，預示台股下週將面臨多空激烈交戰。
selected_charts.action: 關注台積電開盤後能否延續 ADR 的強勢，成為穩定台股的關鍵力量。

selected_charts.title: 市場情緒
selected_charts.description: CNN 恐懼貪婪、加密貨幣情緒、台灣市場情緒與廣度。
selected_charts.takeaway: 市場情緒指標全面亮起紅燈，CNN 恐懼與貪婪指數與加密貨幣情緒皆落入「極度恐懼」區間，與 VIX 飆升的訊號一致，確認了市場普遍的焦慮情緒。
selected_charts.action: 在極端情緒下，市場可能出現非理性波動，需謹慎評估風險。

selected_charts.title: 美股產業輪動
selected_charts.description: 美股 S&P 500 產業 ETF 的輪動與避險偏好變化。
selected_charts.takeaway: 美股類股輪動呈現明顯的避險趨勢，資金從非必需消費、金融等景氣循環股流出，轉向防禦型的公用事業與受惠通膨的能源股，強化了市場的風險趨避基調。
selected_charts.action: 觀察此避險輪動是否為短期現象，或代表資金對經濟前景的長期擔憂。

chart_orchestration.overall_summary: 上週五國際市場劇烈震盪收尾，美股四大指數全面重挫，VIX 恐慌指數飆升至 31 以上，市場避險情緒達到高點。然而，在科技股普遍承壓下，台積電 ADR 逆勢收紅，展現出顯著的個股韌性。此現象預示著下週台股開盤後，將面臨「國際恐慌情緒」與「本土多方信心」的直接對決。週末觀察視角下，短期市場波動風險已大幅增加，焦點將集中在大型權值股的穩盤能力與本土資金的承接力道。

news_themes.label: 全球市場恐慌情緒升溫
news_themes.summary: 美股主要指數上週五全面重挫，VIX 恐慌指數飆升至 31 以上的警戒區，反映出市場因通膨擔憂或地緣政治風險而引發的普遍焦慮與避險情緒。

news_themes.label: 台積電 ADR 逆勢展現韌性
news_themes.summary: 在美股科技股普遍下跌的背景下，台積電 ADR 股價逆勢微幅收漲，與 Nasdaq 期貨的重挫形成鮮明對比，凸顯其獨特的市場地位與投資人信心。

news_themes.label: 資金輪動至防禦性板塊
news_themes.summary: 市場資金流向顯示出典型的風險趨避模式，投資人拋售非必需消費、金融等景氣敏感型股票，轉而投入能源與公用事業等防禦性及抗通膨板塊。
evidence: 公用事業 (XLU) 板塊上漲 0.57%
非必需消費 (XLY) 板塊下跌 2.89%
